reference: BECAUSE DOM MABILLON GIVES FOUR HUNDRED AND SEVENTEEN EPISTLES OF SAINT BERNARD WHILE MERLONUS HORSTIUS ONLY GIVES THREE HUNDRED AND SIXTY SEVEN I DO NOT DESPISE MERLONUS HORSTIUS NEITHER DO I
text: because dom marbilan gives four hundred and seventeen epistles of st bernard while merlonus hortius only gives three hundred and sixty-seven i do not despise merlonus hortius neither do i
